evals.name: trigger-docker-build
evals.prompt: How do I build the Docker image?

assertions.text: Explains the Docker multi-stage build process and docker-compose configuration for the project
Lists the CI/CD workflows: npm-publish on tags, npm-test on PR, docker-build to GHCR

evals.name: trigger-db-switch
evals.prompt: How do I make docker-compose connect to a remote MongoDB instead of the local container?

assertions.text: Explains the base docker-compose.yml + docker-compose.local.yml override and the COMPOSE_FILE toggle in .env (comment it out for remote, keep it uncommented for local node + mongo)

evals.name: negative-vue-component
evals.prompt: How do I create a new Vue component?

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger the deployment skill; component creation routes to vue-ssr-architecture or vue3-composition
